title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
